title: Better UHC & Axe PvP
description: This texture pack adds baisic needs for UHC & Axe PvP
body:
This texture pack adds baisic needs for UHC & Axe PvP
- Smaller Side Shield
- Custom Axe
- Custom Golden Apples
- Smaller Golden Apples
- Smaller Water & Lava And More..
- Crossbow & Bow charging changed so u know when its charged.
- Cobweb Outlines

![The ShowCase of the  changed items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513882e94449362113dc11b3fa3e8556ea9047f6.png)
